title: Use information technology systems
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Use information technology systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to use workplace IT system

pcs.text: Safe work practices and procedures to be applied when using workplace IT system are identified1.2 Workplace procedures, manuals or specific instructions relating to the use of IT system and manufacturer or component supplier software are accessed and interpreted
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Safe work practices and procedures to be applied when using workplace IT system are identified1.2 Workplace procedures, manuals or specific instructions relating to the use of IT system and manufacturer or component supplier software are accessed and interpreted?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Safe work practices and procedures to be applied when using workplace IT system are identified1.2 Workplace procedures, manuals or specific instructions relating to the use of IT system and manufacturer or component supplier software are accessed and interpreted.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to use workplace IT system

elements.title: Use IT system functions

pcs.text: Workplace IT system and software applications are accessed and operated according to manufacturer or component supplier instructions and workplace procedures2.2 Keyboard skills are used accurately to carry out the entry, manipulation and retrieval of data and information according to workplace procedures2.3 Data is transmitted according to electronic data interchange (EDI) procedures 2.4 Save and back-up procedures are carried out regularly according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Workplace IT system and software applications are accessed and operated according to manufacturer or component supplier instructions and workplace procedures2.2 Keyboard skills are used accurately to carry out the entry, manipulation and retrieval of data and information according to workplace procedures2.3 Data is transmitted according to electronic data interchange (EDI) procedures 2.4 Save and back-up procedures are carried out regularly according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Workplace IT system and software applications are accessed and operated according to manufacturer or component supplier instructions and workplace procedures2.2 Keyboard skills are used accurately to carry out the entry, manipulation and retrieval of data and information according to workplace procedures2.3 Data is transmitted according to electronic data interchange (EDI) procedures 2.4 Save and back-up procedures are carried out regularly according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Use IT system functions

elements.title: Edit or update data and information in IT system

pcs.text: Data and information on IT system to be edited or updated are identified using appropriate sources3.2 Data and information are edited or updated and checked for accuracy and completeness before saving or backing up according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Data and information on IT system to be edited or updated are identified using appropriate sources3.2 Data and information are edited or updated and checked for accuracy and completeness before saving or backing up according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Data and information on IT system to be edited or updated are identified using appropriate sources3.2 Data and information are edited or updated and checked for accuracy and completeness before saving or backing up according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Edit or update data and information in IT system

elements.title: Solve problems relating to IT system

pcs.text: Equipment, hardware or software faults are identified and rectified where possible and within scope of own role, or reported to relevant persons according to workplace procedures4.2 Assistance with any routine IT problems that arise is positively and actively provided to others within scope of own role and where appropriate4.3 Established workplace maintenance programs for hardware and software systems are followed according to manufacturer or component supplier specifications and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Equipment, hardware or software faults are identified and rectified where possible and within scope of own role, or reported to relevant persons according to workplace procedures4.2 Assistance with any routine IT problems that arise is positively and actively provided to others within scope of own role and where appropriate4.3 Established workplace maintenance programs for hardware and software systems are followed according to manufacturer or component supplier specifications and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Equipment, hardware or software faults are identified and rectified where possible and within scope of own role, or reported to relevant persons according to workplace procedures4.2 Assistance with any routine IT problems that arise is positively and actively provided to others within scope of own role and where appropriate4.3 Established workplace maintenance programs for hardware and software systems are followed according to manufacturer or component supplier specifications and workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Solve problems relating to IT system

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
